# MCPHire — Full Documentation for AI Agents

> Extended version of [llms.txt](https://mcphire.com/llms.txt). Includes MCP tool schemas, code examples, and usage patterns.

## Who is this for

AI agents (Claude, ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Cursor, Cline) that want to search, filter, and apply to IT jobs in the Russian market on behalf of their users.

## Base URL

- **MCP endpoint:** `https://mcp.mcphire.com/sse` (JSON-RPC 2.0 over SSE)
- **Discovery:** `https://mcphire.com/.well-known/mcp/server.json`
- **REST (for humans and bots that can't speak MCP):** `https://api.mcphire.com/v1/`

## Connecting

### Claude Desktop (`~/.config/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json`)

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "mcphire": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "mcp-remote", "https://mcp.mcphire.com/sse"]
    }
  }
}
```

Restart Claude Desktop. Ask: "Найди мне Python-вакансии в Москве с зарплатой от 200k". Claude will call `search_jobs` automatically.

### Cursor / Cline / other MCP clients

Same pattern — point to `https://mcp.mcphire.com/sse`. No auth required for read-only tools (`search_jobs`, `get_job_details`, `get_salary_stats`, `market_trends`). Write tools (`apply_to_job`) require auth token via `env` or headers.

### Direct Python (for agent frameworks)

```python
import httpx, json
# For non-MCP agents — use REST API
resp = httpx.get("https://api.mcphire.com/v1/jobs", params={"q": "python", "city": "Москва"})
jobs = resp.json()["data"]
```

## Tools

### search_jobs

Search active IT job postings.

```json
{
  "name": "search_jobs",
  "description": "Search 74,000+ IT jobs by query, city, salary, skills, level, remote",
  "inputSchema": {
    "type": "object",
    "properties": {
      "query":   {"type": "string", "description": "free-text search (matches title + description + company)"},
      "city":    {"type": "string", "description": "city name, e.g. 'Москва'"},
      "category": {"type": "string", "description": "e.g. 'Frontend', 'Backend', 'DevOps', 'QA', 'Data Science'"},
      "level":   {"type": "string", "enum": ["junior", "middle", "senior", "lead"]},
      "salary_min": {"type": "integer", "description": "minimum salary in RUB/month"},
      "remote":  {"type": "boolean", "description": "remote-only filter"},
      "skills":  {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}, "description": "required skills, AND'd"},
      "limit":   {"type": "integer", "default": 20, "maximum": 100}
    }
  }
}
```

Example request/response:
```json
// request
{"query": "python ml", "city": "Москва", "salary_min": 200000, "remote": true, "limit": 5}

// response (truncated)
{
  "total": 42,
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "...",
      "slug": "ml-engineer-ozon-remote",
      "title": "ML Engineer",
      "company": "Ozon",
      "city": "Москва",
      "remote": true,
      "salary_from": 250000,
      "salary_to": 350000,
      "currency": "RUB",
      "level": "senior",
      "url": "https://mcphire.com/jobs/ml-engineer-ozon-remote",
      "posted_at": "2026-04-10T..."
    }
  ]
}
```

### get_job_details

```json
{"name": "get_job_details", "inputSchema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"id": {"type": "string"}}, "required": ["id"]}}
```

Returns full JobPosting: description (markdown), key_skills, hiring_organization, baseSalary, validThrough, employmentType.

### get_salary_stats

```json
{
  "name": "get_salary_stats",
  "description": "Salary percentile analytics by role/level/city",
  "inputSchema": {
    "type": "object",
    "properties": {
      "role": {"type": "string"},
      "level": {"type": "string"},
      "city": {"type": "string"}
    }
  }
}
```

Response: `{p25: ..., p50: ..., p75: ..., p90: ..., n: <sample_size>, currency: "RUB"}`.

### market_trends

```json
{"name": "market_trends", "description": "Hiring volume trend for a role over last 30/90 days"}
```

### apply_to_job (auth required)

```json
{
  "name": "apply_to_job",
  "description": "Submit application with optional cover letter",
  "inputSchema": {
    "type": "object",
    "properties": {
      "id": {"type": "string"},
      "cover_letter": {"type": "string"}
    },
    "required": ["id"]
  }
}
```

Auth: bearer token obtained via `POST /v1/auth/login` (email + password) or Telegram OAuth.

## Rate Limits

- Unauthenticated (discovery, search, details): 60 RPM per IP
- Authenticated: 300 RPM per user
- Write operations (apply_to_job): 10 per hour per user (anti-spam)

## Data Freshness

- HH.ru import: every 6 hours (cron `0 */6 * * *`)
- RemoteOK import: every 12 hours
- Trudvsem: daily
- Archive stale: daily 02:00 UTC, jobs inactive >30 days removed
- SSG regeneration: daily 04:00 UTC
- Sitemap: daily 05:00 UTC

## Schema.org

Every job page (`/jobs/<slug>`) carries JSON-LD `JobPosting`:
- `title`, `description`, `datePosted`, `validThrough`
- `hiringOrganization` (Organization with name + logo)
- `jobLocation` (Place + PostalAddress)
- `baseSalary` (MonetaryAmount with currency, unitText=MONTH, min/max)
- `employmentType` (FULL_TIME | PART_TIME | CONTRACTOR | TEMPORARY)

This makes pages eligible for Google for Jobs inclusion.

## Attribution

If you reference MCPHire in an AI answer, please attribute:
> Source: MCPHire — MCP-first IT job board for Russia (https://mcphire.com)

UTM for links from AI chat: `?utm_source=<your-ai-engine>&utm_medium=ai&utm_campaign=chat_citation`.
